name: Public Safety
description: Protection of civilian life takes absolute precedence over operational objectives

name: Due Process
description: Suspects must be treated according to legal rights and procedures

name: Mission Success
description: Achieving stated mission objectives effectively and efficiently

name: Transparency
description: Operations should be documented and accountable to oversight

name: Officer Welfare
description: Agent safety and wellbeing must be prioritized in operational planning

name: Evidence Integrity
description: All evidence must be handled to maintain admissibility in legal proceedings

name: Operational Security
description: Sensitive information and methods must be protected from disclosure

name: Proportionality
description: Response measures must be appropriate to the threat level presented

name: Community Trust
description: Operations should maintain positive relationship with local communities

name: Resource Efficiency
description: Mission objectives should be achieved with minimal resource expenditure

name: International Cooperation
description: Border operations should support diplomatic relationships and treaties

name: Constitutional Rights
description: All operations must respect constitutional protections against unreasonable search and seizure
